overall.description: A stationary first-person view from inside a modern apartment in Cyberpunk 2077, watching a television talk show program. The scene features a large flatscreen TV displaying a cyberpunk-style interview with two hosts, set against a backdrop of floor-to-ceiling windows revealing a futuristic cityscape. The program transitions to a commercial break with NC4 branding.

scene_state.functional_zone: modern apartment living room with television and city view

events.description: television program displays full-screen graphic with 'PASSION' text and lion imagery
television cuts to close-up shot of female host with red mohawk sitting on purple couch
television cuts to close-up shot of male host in yellow jacket behind orange desk

agents.ego_description: sitting stationary in an apartment, watching a talk show on the television

segments.scene_description: The viewer sits in a modern apartment with floor-to-ceiling windows revealing a futuristic cityscape. A flatscreen TV dominates the center of view, playing a cyberpunk talk show featuring two hosts in a vibrant neon-lit studio. The program cuts between wide shots and close-ups of the hosts as they converse.

scene_state.functional_zone: modern apartment living room during commercial break

events.description: television program ends and screen transitions to red background with NC4 logo
television displays advertisement for a red and black firearm

agents.ego_description: continuing to watch as the television program transitions to commercials

segments.scene_description: The television screen transitions from the talk show to a red NC4 branding screen, followed by a weapon advertisement. The apartment setting remains unchanged with the city view still visible through the windows.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a stationary first-person perspective inside a modern apartment as a television program transitions from a live talk show to a commercial break. It begins with a view of a large flatscreen TV displaying two hosts in a vibrant, neon-lit studio, with the camera capturing the program's cuts between wide shots and close-ups. As the interview concludes, the screen shifts abruptly to a bold red NC4 branding page. The scene then opens into a weapon advertisement on the television, while the surrounding apartment and the futuristic cityscape visible through the floor-to-ceiling windows remain constant.
